current_write_path_constraints.prediction_runs: No target_draw, no draw_close_at, no protocol/activation membership, no semantic unique key beyond AUTOINCREMENT id (lottery_api/database.py CREATE TABLE prediction_runs).
current_write_path_constraints.prediction_items: special is nullable with no conditional POWER constraint; no UNIQUE(run_id, bet_index) (lottery_api/database.py CREATE TABLE prediction_items).
current_write_path_constraints.snapshot_schedule: UNIQUE(lottery_type, target_draw) and a target_date exist, but there is no draw_close_at, no timezone, and the table is mutable.
current_write_path_constraints.strategy_prediction_replays: Retrospective store that co-locates predicted and actual payloads; mutable; must not become the confirmatory prospective population.
current_write_path_constraints.controlled_apply: scripts/p4c3_supported_prediction_apply.py opens a read-only mode=ro preflight, checks a fingerprint via notes/review_json LIKE on that read-only connection, then inserts on a separate connection under BEGIN IMMEDIATE; there is no matching database unique key, leaving a time-of-check/time-of-use race.
current_write_path_constraints.deleted_hooks: lottery_api/routes/ingest.py still imports engine.prediction_tracker.resolve_pending and engine.snapshot_scheduler.ensure_next_schedule inside try/except that degrade to warnings; both modules are absent from the current tree.
current_write_path_constraints.destructive_paths: lottery_api/database.py clear_all_data() and delete_draw() issue DELETE statements, confirming current tables are not append-only.

ledger_schema_design.principle: Separate append-only prospective tables; never reuse prediction_runs/prediction_items/prediction_results or strategy_prediction_replays as the confirmatory population.

prospective_activation_registry.purpose: One immutable row per merged activation artifact; the only source of an active activation_id and prospective start instant.

prospective_capture_batches.purpose: One immutable row per (activation, lottery_type, target_draw) capture cluster.

prospective_prediction_ledger.purpose: Append-only per-ticket prospective prediction record. Primary confirmatory population.
prospective_prediction_ledger.unique_key: UNIQUE(activation_id, lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, strategy_version, bet_index)

prospective_capture_events.purpose: Append-only event stream: capture, rejection, amendment, invalidation, and later outcome-link events.

prospective_outcome_links.purpose: Separate outcome linkage created only after draw completion; never writes predicted fields and never changes ledger membership.
prospective_outcome_links.note: Actual numbers/results live in the existing separate result path, not here and not in the ledger.

identity_contract.content_hash: payload_hash = sha256 over canonical(activation_id, lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, strategy_version, bet_index, sorted(predicted_main_numbers), predicted_second_zone, prediction_created_at_utc).
identity_contract.ledger_id_derivation: ledger_id is a deterministic function of the identity tuple so the same prospective ticket can never receive two distinct ledger ids.

uniqueness_contract.unique_key: UNIQUE(activation_id, lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, strategy_version, bet_index)
uniqueness_contract.duplicate_outcome: A conflicting insert is rejected idempotently and recorded as a DUPLICATE_IDENTITY rejection event; a second eligible row is never created.

transaction_contract.conflict_policy: ON CONFLICT over the semantic unique key resolves to fail-closed idempotent rejection, never silent replace or update.

immutability_contract.enforcement: Database BEFORE UPDATE and BEFORE DELETE triggers on prospective_prediction_ledger, prospective_capture_batches, and prospective_capture_events RAISE(ABORT).
immutability_contract.tamper_evidence: payload_hash plus append-only capture events make any post-insert change detectable.

amendment_contract.mechanism: A correction is a new append-only AMENDMENT event (and, if needed, a new ineligible ledger row) that references the original; the original is invalidated by event, never overwritten or deleted.

causality_contract.rule: prediction_created_at_utc < draw_close_at_utc, compared as timezone-aware UTC instants.
causality_contract.clock_skew_tolerance: An explicit, conservative clock-skew margin is subtracted from draw_close_at_utc (prediction_created_at_utc must be earlier than draw_close_at_utc minus the clock-skew margin); the margin is configured per draw-close source version and never silently widened.

source_types.versioning: Each fetched schedule snapshot is content-hashed and versioned.
source_types.refresh_failure_behavior: On fetch failure or hash mismatch, fail closed; do not capture.
source_types.timezone: Resolved in Asia/Taipei then converted to UTC.
source_types.fail_closed_rule: Unknown/holiday/exception or stale snapshot blocks confirmatory capture.

source_types.refresh_failure_behavior: Stale or missing revision fails closed.
source_types.fail_closed_rule: Exceptions not covered by the published revision fail closed.

source_types.versioning: config/prospective_draw_schedule.json with explicit version and hash.
source_types.refresh_failure_behavior: Missing or unverified exception declaration fails closed.
source_types.fail_closed_rule: Any draw not covered by a verified deterministic rule fails closed.

source_types.versioning: Recorded as a manual provenance event.
source_types.refresh_failure_behavior: Not applicable; manual entries are non-refreshing.
source_types.timezone: Must be supplied as explicit Asia/Taipei or UTC; naive input rejected.
source_types.fail_closed_rule: A manual close time can never silently become confirmatory.

timezone_contract.both_instants_normalized: Both prediction_created_at_utc and draw_close_at_utc are normalized to UTC before comparison.

power_second_zone_contract.rejection_reason: MISSING_OR_INVALID_PREDICTED_SECOND_ZONE invalidates the whole POWER target-draw cluster; never defaulted, inferred, or backfilled.

backfill_exclusion_contract.only_live_pre_close_capture_eligible: Only LIVE_PRE_CLOSE capture_mode after activation may be eligible; MANUAL, RECONSTRUCTED, BACKFILL, IMPORT, and post-close attempts are stored as immutable rejections or omitted.

failure_matrix.detection: draw_close_at_utc absent or unresolved from a versioned source
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Reject capture; record CLOSE_TIME_MISSING rejection event; no eligible row.

failure_matrix.detection: Source snapshot older than freshness window or hash mismatch
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Reject capture; record STALE_SCHEDULE rejection; require fresh verified snapshot.

failure_matrix.detection: lottery_type not in the supported set
Wrong count, out of range, duplicate, or non-integer main numbers
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Reject ticket; record INVALID_PREDICTED_NUMBERS rejection; never coerce.

failure_matrix.detection: POWER_LOTTO predicted_second_zone null or invalid at creation
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Reject and invalidate the POWER target-draw cluster; MISSING_OR_INVALID_PREDICTED_SECOND_ZONE.

failure_matrix.detection: Semantic unique key conflict at insert
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Idempotent rejection; DUPLICATE_IDENTITY event; no second eligible row.

failure_matrix.detection: Naive or ambiguous timezone on either instant
prediction_created_at_utc not strictly earlier than draw_close_at_utc minus skew margin
No active activation_id, or creation time before prospective_start_at_utc
strategy_id/strategy_version not resolvable to an immutable source version
Any error inside the BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Roll back the whole transaction; no partial ledger or event rows persist.

failure_matrix.detection: One ticket in a multi-ticket batch fails validation or insert
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Atomic all-or-nothing: the entire batch is rolled back; PARTIAL_BATCH_REJECTED event.

failure_matrix.detection: capture_mode in {MANUAL, RECONSTRUCTED, BACKFILL, IMPORT} or non-live origin
failure_matrix.fail_closed_behavior: Reject from the prospective population; BACKFILL_EXCLUDED rejection.

failure_matrix.detection: Missing/invalid source_provenance or draw-close source provenance fields

migration_plan.rehearsal_target: Synthetic or temporary copy databases only.
steps: Define additive CREATE TABLE / CREATE TRIGGER / CREATE UNIQUE INDEX statements in a new migration script.
Apply against a synthetic temp DB in tests; assert constraints, triggers, and uniqueness behavior.
No ALTER/DROP of existing tables; no write to lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db.
Production migration execution is deferred to a separately authorized P271K rehearsal then a later controlled deployment.

rollback_and_deactivation_plan.deactivation_mechanism: Set the activation registry row status to DEACTIVATED; captured records remain immutable and auditable.
rollback_and_deactivation_plan.rollback_mechanism: Additive schema can be dropped only on a non-production rehearsal copy; production rollback is a separately authorized operation and never deletes captured prospective records.

proposed_future_allowed_files.purpose: Additive prospective ledger/batch/event/activation/outcome-link schema for new databases only.
New fail-closed one-shot capture service; disabled, no activation in implementation.
Versioned authoritative Asia/Taipei draw-close and timezone resolver.
Additive migration implementation tested only on synthetic/temp DB copies.
One-shot capture worker with default no-write preflight; live write/scheduling unauthorized.
Versioned schedule metadata and exception declarations, pending manual official verification.
Synthetic contract tests for causality, uniqueness, immutability, POWER, and contamination guards.

limitations: Design only: no schema, runtime code, migration, deployment, or prospective activation was created or executed.
No production DB was opened; the design is grounded in source/schema files and the verified P271H artifact.
No official closing-time source was machine-verified; source_verification_status remains MANUAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED.
No baseline, statistical, scorer, adapter, or strategy comparison work was performed.
The proposed future whitelist is a proposal only and does not authorize modifying production code, migrating a database, deploying, or activating collection.
